hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"$/\1/'); if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'backend/src/.*\.ts$'; then missing=$(grep -n "from '\.\.\?/" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "\.js'" | grep -v "node:" | head -5); if [ -n "$missing" ]; then echo "⚠️  Missing .js extension on local imports in $file_path:"; echo "$missing"; echo "All local imports in the backend MUST end with .js (ESM requirement)"; exit 1; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"\s*:\s*"(git commit|git push)'; then cd backend && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -5; BUILD_EXIT=$?; if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '⚠️  Backend build failed — fix TypeScript errors before committing'; exit 1; fi; fi
